case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. NATANAEL BUENO GARCIA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, NATANAEL BUENO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE; REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED DEC-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, NATANAEL BUENO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BY OSCAR GARICA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
